headlines.title: California governor candidates tangle over immigration, homelessness in tense debate
headlines.description: The seven top candidates in California’s race for governor sparred at a tense debate Wednesday, throwing criticisms at one another over a litany of issues, like affordability, sanctuary policies and experience, along with as a healthy dose of personal insults

headlines.title: Indiana Republicans who lost their jobs after bucking Trump have ‘zero regrets’
headlines.description: Three state senators who were defeated in Tuesday’s primary told NBC News they haven’t changed their minds about the redistricting vote that drew Trump’s ire.

headlines.title: Marco Rubio meets with Pope Leo after Trump’s criticism over Iran war
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio was set to meet with Pope Leo at the Vatican on Thursday, an audience that follows President Donald Trump’s criticism of the first American pontiff over the Iran war.

headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report of the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: Judge says DOJ can keep 2020 election ballots FBI seized from Fulton County
headlines.description: The judge ruled the county hadn’t demonstrated that the federal government acted with “callous disregard” in taking the ballots.

headlines.title: Question on state’s sanctuary law turned into personal jabs during California gubernatorial debate
headlines.description: In the race to become California’s next governor, candidates were asked about the state’s law restricting local authorities from cooperating with federal law enforcement, with remarks at times becoming heated between the participants.

headlines.title: Steyer only candidate who supports California wealth tax during debate
headlines.description: All seven candidates on stage during the debate in the California governor's race were asked if they supported the state’s proposed billionaire tax that could appear on the ballot this fall, but only Democrat Tom Steyer said he would sign it.

headlines.title: California gubernatorial candidates debate affordable housing
headlines.description: In a debate ahead of the June governor's primary election, candidates including Republican Chad Bianco and Democrats Tom Steyer and Xavier Becerra, weighed in on making housing more affordable across the state of California.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.
